title: dichondra repens var. micrantha
intro: Dichondra repens var. micrantha, also known as Mexican creeping herb or Mexican silver leaf, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dichondra repens var. micrantha include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
